  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
  2. FitnessFunction

Verwendungen von Schnittstelle
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.FitnessFunction

Packages, die FitnessFunction verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).

  • Verwendungen von FitnessFunction in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config

    Felder in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config, die deklariert sind als FitnessFunction
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    FitnessFunction<Character>
    CryptanalysisGAConfig.fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating the quality of candidate decryptions.
    FitnessFunction<Integer>
    KnapsackGAConfig.fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating knapsack solutions.
    FitnessFunction<Integer>
    SudokuGAConfig.fitnessFunction
     
    FitnessFunction<SymRegNode>
    SymRegGAConfig.fitnessFunction
     
    FitnessFunction<Integer>
    TSPGAConfig.fitnessFunction
    Fitness function evaluating TSP tours.

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    FitnessFunction<T>
    GAProblem.getFitnessFunction()
    Retrieves the strictly configured fitness function representing the mathematical goal of this specific problem domain.

    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    GeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, Selection<T> selection, Crossover<T> crossover, Mutation<T> mutation, FitnessFunction<T> fitnessFunction, double crossoverRate, double mutationRate)
    Creates a new genetic algorithm instance with the specified components.
